original_abstract: Skeletal editing enables atom-level modifications to molecular skeletons. This review highlights advances in single-atom insertions, deletions, and transmutations in (hetero)cyclic systems, offering a comprehensive view on cutting-edge strategies.
humanized_abstract: Skeletal editing is a term that was introduced to describe that it is possible to carry out changes at the atom level to the molecular skeleton. This review provides a comprehensive overview of the developments in the field of single atom insertions, deletions and transmutations mainly in the context of (hetero)cyclic systems.
